name: ensp-local-assistant
description: Local launcher for saved eNSP topology templates.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n WEB,API -c "#5b7cfa,#159957" "npm run dev --workspace apps/web" "npm run dev --workspace apps/server"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/shared && npm run build --workspace apps/server && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/server
